title: Octopus Dog Toys, No Stuffing Squeaky Dog Toys Interactive Octopus Dog Chew Toys with Crinkle Paper for Small Medium Dogs Playing and Training (Purple)
features: 【Material】The squeaky dog toy is made of high-quality plush, using crystal super-soft composite sandwich mesh, the fabric feels smooth, and will not harm the health of dogs.
【No Stuffing】Plush dog chew toy has no cotton padding inside, which is safer for dogs to chew and bite without worrying about swallowing or choking.

【Squeaky Crinkle Paper】The squeak of the BB is hidden in the head of the octopus dog toy, as long as you squeeze the octopus head hard, it will make a sound; the 8 legs of the sound Octopus contain wrinkled paper, which can create more excitement for the dog when playing and chewing.

【Dog Birthday Present】This lightweight plush dog toy is suitable for throwing out for fetching games with your pet both indoors and outdoors, and is a great toy to interact with your puppy. I believe your dog will be very happy to receive this christmas gift or birthday gift.
【Octopus Shape】Adopt the shape of an octopus, the dog chew toy is colorful and cute, and will capture your dog's interest and keep them entertained.
description: Product Description Specifications: Weight: about 58g Size: 32cm*8cm*8cm Filling: no filling cotton + BB call + crinckle paper Material: plush + crystal super soft composite sandwich mesh Easy to clean The body and legs of the octopus toy are not filled with cotton, which is easy to clean. The BB sound button is on the head of the octopus toy. Pressing the button will make a sound. The octopus toy's eight feet will make the sound of wrinkled paper when twisting, which can create more excitement and fun for the dog when playing and chewing. Good choice: The plush dog toy is made of double-layer fabric, and the crystal super-soft composite sandwich mesh is foamed, which has high fastness, stronger bite resistance, and long service life. The dog chewing octopus toy is made of fabric, soft to the touch. The eyes of the octopus are made of electro-embroidery, and the embroidery is exquisite. Package Including： 1 x Squeaky Dog Interactive Play Toy 1.It will not produce substances harmful to pets The squeaky dog toy is made of high-quality plush, using crystal super-soft composite sandwich mesh, the fabric feels smooth, and will not harm the health of dogs. 2.Leisure time This colorful Octopus plush dog toy is a lovely character. It will attract your dogs' interest and keep them entertained. It is very suitable for dogs, small and medium-sized dogs. 3.Dog's favorite These toys are machine washable or hand washable and easy to clean.
